summary: Completed testing of Iteration 15 features: All 13 backend tests passed, all frontend features verified. Key features working: (1) 50K NB simulation returns realistic probabilities (77.8% vs 22.3%, not 100/0), (2) Predicted scores displayed (152 vs 134), (3) Edge reasons panel with 'WHY THIS SIGNAL?' heading and 3 explanation pointers, (4) Match State hidden for upcoming matches (overs=0, score=0), (5) Two-sided Factor Breakdown with team names on left/right headers, (6) User Guide floating button (? icon, bottom-left) opens modal with 10 sections, (7) P10-P90 ranges with tooltips, (8) Venue Performance numbers rounded (no long decimals).

issues: React warning: textTransform prop on DOM element - minor, doesn't affect functionality

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/consult returns realistic simulation probabilities (77.8% vs 22.3%, not 100/0)
Backend: team1_win_prob + team2_win_prob sums to ~1.0
Backend: mean_team1_score (152) and mean_team2_score (134) populated
Backend: edge_reasons array non-empty when market odds provided (3 reasons)
Backend: Player impact players have team names matching match teams (Mumbai Indians, Delhi Capitals)
Backend: Simulation runs 50,000 iterations
Backend: P10-P90 score ranges exist and P90 > P10
Backend: Verdict section has winner, winner_short, strength, winner_probability
Backend: value_signal exists with valid signal type (STRONG_VALUE)
Backend: Features show overs=0, score=0 for upcoming matches
Backend: Schedule loads with 70 matches
Backend: Match ipl2026_008 (MI vs DC) exists
Backend: Pre-match prediction exists for ipl2026_008
Frontend: Home page loads with LIVE/UPCOMING/COMPLETED tabs
Frontend: Match cards render with predictions (MI 62%, DC 38%)
Frontend: Pre-match page loads with Algorithm Prediction Breakdown
Frontend: Factor Breakdown shows two-sided bars with MI on left, DC on right headers
Frontend: All 5 factor bars present (H2H, Venue, Form, Squad, Home)
Frontend: Consultant Dashboard with risk tolerance toggle and market odds inputs
Frontend: Running consultation shows loading state 'Running 50K Simulations...'
Frontend: Verdict section displays 'MI WINS' with 'STRONG' badge and 'STRONG VALUE' signal
Frontend: Edge Reasons panel shows 'WHY THIS SIGNAL?' with 3 explanation pointers
Frontend: SimulationSummary shows predicted scores (152 vs 134) and 50,000 simulations
Frontend: P10-P90 range displayed in Simulation Summary
Frontend: Match State section correctly hidden for upcoming match (overs=0, score=0)
Frontend: User Guide floating button (? icon, bottom-left) visible
Frontend: User Guide modal opens with 10 sections
Frontend: User Guide sections expand/collapse, Q&A items expand to show answers
Frontend: Venue Performance numbers are rounded (no long decimal strings)
Frontend: Betting Scenarios display with HIGH/MEDIUM confidence badges
Frontend: Odds Visual section shows Model vs Market probabilities
test_credentials: No authentication required - open access app
seed_data_creation: None - used existing match ipl2026_008 (MI vs DC)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 15 features fully working. All requested features verified: (1) 50K NB simulation fix confirmed - realistic probabilities (77.8% vs 22.3%) and scores (152 vs 134). (2) Two-sided Factor Breakdown with green/red bars and team headers on left/right. (3) Edge Reasons panel with 'WHY THIS SIGNAL?' heading and 3 explanation pointers. (4) SimulationSummary shows predicted scores and P10-P90 ranges with tooltips. (5) Match State hidden for upcoming matches (conditional render on overs=0 && score=0). (6) User Guide floating button (? icon, bottom-left, z-50) opens modal with 10 sections covering all app features. (7) Venue Performance numbers rounded. Test match ipl2026_008 (MI vs DC) used with market_pct_team1=55, market_pct_team2=45.

edge_reasons.heading: WHY THIS SIGNAL?
example_reasons: Model rates Mumbai Indians at 66.1%, market only gives 55.0% — 11.2% undervalued.
High model confidence (66.1%) backed by H2H, venue form, and squad quality.
Edge of 11.2% is significant — this is a clear market mispricing.

p10_p90_tooltips.tooltip_text: P10-P90 range: In 80% of simulations, this team scores between these two numbers.
